title: Warm up
content: The slide features images of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image highlights a distinct driving scenario and cityscape.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide depicts the theme of China’s evolving nature with images of taxis and iconic Chinese architecture. It serves as an introduction to the presentation, titled 'A Ride Through China'.
key_claims: Introduction to the journey across Chinese cities

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines the structure of the session focused on investigating and researching cities. It highlights three main areas: local features, development strategies, and outcomes with positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide pairs cities with their unique development strategies. Beijing is linked to technology and tradition integration, Chongqing to sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou to tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide illustrates development strategies viewed through the experiences of taxi drivers across three cities. It asserts that each city forms its development approach based on local features.
key_claims: Cities develop strategies based on local features
An evolving nation with unique strategies
